title: LetterCraft
description: Replaces Crafting with Spelling! Rearrange letters in item names to craft!
body:
This mod replaces crafting with spelling! You spawn with a Crafting Table, which is now actually a Spelling Table with a keypad full of letters you've collected! Watch a [quick example video here](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/-B3_Z5lGGOY)!

![Spelling 'COMMANDBLOCK'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Df9Ubre7/images/0e3c71968a62c6882db8d1b829138843a1a85b45.png)

How do you obtain letters? Just craft them in your 2x2 inventory crafting grid from any item!

![Converting an Oak Log into letters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Df9Ubre7/images/d0336631ed7879684ce07193dc9cf4541bc753e9.png)

LetterCraft has a few commands:
| Command  | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `/function lettercraft:set_language {language:en_pt}` | Set the language using in-game locale code, [full list here](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Language#Languages). Only languages using Latin characters are supported, and diacritic (accented) characters get standardized. |
| `/function lettercraft:all_99` | Give yourself 99 of every letter |
| `/function lettercraft:clear` | Clear all letters from yourself |

## FAQ (no one has asked these but I'm assuming someone will eventually)
- Why don't I lose my letters on death?
   - _I've yet to add that as a feature, it will likely be some sort of gamerule toggle, but I haven't decided how I want to handle losing letters on death, since they'd have to somehow drop into the world._
- How can I view my letters without a Crafting Table?
   - _You can't, which is why I've made it so the player spawns with one. I'd like to change this at some point, but I've yet to decide how I want to handle it._
- Why can't I convert a Crafting Table into letters?
   - _Because players always respawn with a Crafting Table, so I didn't want to make it easy to farm those letters._
- Will you add support for my language?
   - _At the moment, I do not have plans to add support for new languages, as the entire system is built on Latin alphabet characters, and I'd have to make significant changes to support other alphabets._

---

Wanna know what makes LetterCraft tick? This entire data pack was [originally made live on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m6nqAzvPEmQ)! There have been some updates for fixes and tweaks, but the core systems that make this vanilla mod possible are all (somewhat) explained in this massive video!
